---
title: "Towards Removing Undef Values From LLVM IR"
date: 2026-06-15
year: 2026
pdf: "https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3808250"
venue: "PLDI 2026"
code: ""
slides: ""
preprint: ""
video: ""
author:
  - name: Pedro Lobo 
  - name: John McIver 
  - name: George Mitenkov
  - name: Juneyoung Lee
  - name: Kirshanthan Sundararajah
  - name: Nuno P. Lopes
categories:
  - Conference
description: ""
---
